title: Soul-Keeper
description: SoulKeeper automatically creates virtual tombs when you die, protecting your items with holograms and anti-hopper protection. Never lose your items again!
body:
🏺 SoulKeeper Plugin - User Manual
📖 Description
SoulKeeper automatically creates virtual tombs when you die, protecting your items with holograms and anti-hopper protection. Never lose your items again!
✨ Key Features

🏺 Automatic tombs on death
🛡️ Temporary protection against other players
🚫 Anti-hopper - Blocks automated extraction
👻 Informative holograms with remaining time
🎮 Intuitive GUI for collecting items
🔧 Configurable - Change block type, times, limits
🌍 Multi-language (Spanish/English)

🎯 How It Works
💀 On Death

Your items are automatically saved in a virtual tomb
A representative block appears (LODESTONE by default)
A hologram is created with tomb information
The tomb is protected for 5 minutes (configurable)

🖱️ Tomb Interaction

Right click → Opens GUI to take individual items
Shift + Right click → Collects all items instantly
Break block → Drops all items to the ground

🎮 Tomb GUI

📦 45 slots for your items
⏰ Time info remaining
🛡️ Protection status
📍 Location coordinates
🏃‍♂️ "Collect All" button for quick collection

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad454a16539de893667b8821ad02fdefb6501f74.png)

⚙️ Configuration
🏺 Tombs
yamltomb:
  block_type: "LODESTONE"           # Block type
  max_tombs_per_player: 5           # Maximum per player
  lifespan_seconds: 1800            # 30 minutes lifespan
  protection:
    duration_seconds: 300           # 5 minutes protected
    block_automated_extraction_always: true  # Anti-hopper
👻 Holograms
yamlhologram:
  enabled: true
  lines:
    - "&6&l⚰ TOMB ⚰"
    - "&7Owner: &e%player%"
    - "&7Time remaining: &c%time_remaining%"

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c76ae9354b3b75025c7cb0a51f53728d48a77f1.png)

🏗️ Custom Resource Packs
✅ Compatible with custom textures/models

Use CustomModelData in your resource pack
Plugin automatically detects base Material

🌍 Languages

Spanish (es_ES) - Default language
English (en_US) - Change with /sk language en_US

🚨 Anti-Hopper Protection

🚫 Blocks extraction by hoppers/hoppers
🛡️ Works on protected and unprotected tombs
⚙️ Configurable in block_automated_extraction_always

📊 Technical Information

Minecraft Version: 1.16.5+
API: Spigot/Paper
Storage: Virtual with file persistence
Performance: Optimized for large servers

🐛 Troubleshooting
❓ Tomb doesn't appear

Verify keepInventory is set to false
Check player permissions
Review that you haven't reached tomb limit

👻 Holograms not visible

Use /sk cleanholograms to clean bugged holograms
Verify hologram.enabled is set to true

🔧 Items don't synchronize

Use /sk forcesync for manual synchronization
Run /sk diagnostic to see system status

💡 Tips

🏃‍♂️ Shift+Click is the fastest way to collect everything
📍 Save important coordinates with /sk tombcoords
🕐 Collect quickly - Tombs have limited time
🛡️ First 5 minutes are completely protected

🔗 More information: Modrinth
👨‍💻 Developed by: DeLaRosaPlay
📝 Version: 1.0.0
